questions.question: Describe the importance of project planning in software development, highlighting its influence on project goals, timelines, and resource allocation. (15 marks)

Explain the role of quality management in ensuring software development meets user requirements and expectations. Provide an example of a quality management process in a real-world software development project. (20 marks)

Compare and contrast the roles of project planning and quality management in software development. How do these two aspects interact, and what are the consequences of neglecting either of them? (15 marks)
